name: seo-geo-claude-skills
description: 20 skills and 9 commands for Search Engine Optimization (SEO) and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). Content quality powered by CORE-EEAT (80 items). Domain authority powered by CITE (40 items). Tool-agnostic — works with or without integrations.

commands.name: audit-page
commands.description: Run a comprehensive on-page SEO + CORE-EEAT content quality audit for a given URL or content

commands.name: audit-domain
commands.description: Run a full CITE domain authority audit with 40-item scoring, veto checks, and prioritized action plan

commands.name: check-technical
commands.description: Run a quick technical SEO health check for a given URL or domain

commands.name: generate-schema
commands.description: Generate Schema.org JSON-LD structured data markup for a page

commands.name: keyword-research
commands.description: Research and analyze keywords for a topic or niche

commands.name: optimize-meta
commands.description: Optimize title tags, meta descriptions, and Open Graph tags for a page

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate a comprehensive SEO and GEO performance report

commands.name: setup-alert
commands.description: Configure monitoring alerts for critical SEO and GEO metrics

commands.name: write-content
commands.description: Write SEO and GEO optimized content from a topic and target keyword

skills.name: keyword-research
skills.description: Discovers high-value keywords with search intent classification, difficulty scoring, and topic clustering

skills.name: competitor-analysis
skills.description: Analyzes competitor SEO and GEO strategies including keyword gaps, content tactics, and authority signals

skills.name: serp-analysis
skills.description: Analyzes search engine results pages to identify ranking patterns, SERP features, and content opportunities

skills.name: content-gap-analysis
skills.description: Identifies topic coverage gaps by comparing existing content against competitor and SERP data

skills.name: seo-content-writer
skills.description: Creates keyword-optimized content using a 12-step workflow with CORE-EEAT quality checks

skills.name: geo-content-optimizer
skills.description: Optimizes content for AI citation by enhancing quotability, factual density, and structured data

skills.name: meta-tags-optimizer
skills.description: Generates optimized title tags, meta descriptions, and Open Graph tags with CTR-focused formulas

skills.name: schema-markup-generator
skills.description: Generates Schema.org JSON-LD structured data markup based on content type and page context

skills.name: on-page-seo-auditor
skills.description: Performs comprehensive on-page SEO audits covering title, meta, headers, content, links, and images

skills.name: technical-seo-checker
skills.description: Audits technical SEO health including crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, and server configuration

skills.name: internal-linking-optimizer
skills.description: Analyzes and improves internal link structure for better crawl efficiency and authority distribution

skills.name: content-refresher
skills.description: Identifies and refreshes decaying content using traffic signals, freshness checks, and CORE-EEAT scoring

skills.name: rank-tracker
skills.description: Tracks keyword ranking positions over time with trend analysis and SERP feature monitoring

skills.name: backlink-analyzer
skills.description: Analyzes backlink profiles for quality, toxicity, anchor text distribution, and link-building opportunities

skills.name: performance-reporter
skills.description: Generates SEO and GEO performance reports with KPI tracking, trend analysis, and recommendations

skills.name: alert-manager
skills.description: Configures and manages monitoring alerts for critical SEO and GEO metric changes

skills.name: content-quality-auditor
skills.description: Scores content quality using the 80-item CORE-EEAT framework with veto checks and dimension breakdowns

skills.name: domain-authority-auditor
skills.description: Audits domain authority using the 40-item CITE framework with veto checks and action prioritization

skills.name: entity-optimizer
skills.description: Optimizes entity presence across Knowledge Graph, Wikidata, and structured data for AI discoverability

skills.name: memory-management
skills.description: Manages a two-layer memory system for SEO/GEO project context with hot cache and cold storage
